title: Syracuse police watchdog’s investigations on hold, future uncertain
summary: Syracuse's police review board has indefinitely suspended over 70 misconduct investigations and halted new complaint intake following a court ruling affecting Rochester's police oversight agency. The pause creates uncertainty about the watchdog's operational future and investigative capacity.

political_signal.description: Court ruling affecting police oversight agencies creates operational disruption and raises governance questions about complaint investigation infrastructure and accountability mechanisms.

processing_notes: Article references Rochester court ruling but lacks specifics—recommend cross-referencing Rochester news for legal precedent context
Status is 'indefinite' pause, not permanent closure—monitoring required for resolution updates
Affects constituent complaint processing pipeline; potential impact on 311 complaint routing should be assessed
No specific financial impact quantified in excerpt; investigation backlog may have budget/resource implications
